title: PogCraft
body:
# PogCraft

*Note: This is a modpack for a private server made primarily of mods from Fabulously Optimized and a few other mods. Anyone can use this but keep in mind it was made for a private server.*

This modpacks function adds many helpful optimizations and other small tools and tweaks to Minecraft to make it run better and make certain tasks like building and exploration a little easier without making it feel un-vanilla such as a mini-map and voice chat. As previously mentioned this modpack is made primarily from Fabulously Optimized and has other mods like voice chat and  Xaero's Mini Map. A full list of mods can be found by clicking on the preferred version under dependency.

### This mod is client side
You should be able to join a vanilla server with this pack installed but some mods such as voice chat need the server-side mod installed to function.

### Why Install?
This modpack was made to make the installation of mods as easy as possible by making it a single download instead of having to find all the mods and installing them one by one. Follow Modrinths guide on installing the modpack here: https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play
